name: Documentation Issue
description: Report a problem with the documentation
labels: ['docs']

body:
  - type: textarea
    attributes:
      label: Description
      description: What is the issue?
      placeholder: The documentation for X is unclear because...

  - type: textarea
    attributes:
      label: Expected vs Actual
      description: What should it say vs what does it say?

  - type: textarea
    attributes:
      label: Suggested Fix
      description: How could we improve it?
